title: Silly rat - little fun rat
description: this mod adds a rat wich is a new item that can be crafted. This item would be a cute, quirky addition to Minecraft, adding a bit of fun without introducing a whole new mob.
body:
# Content
This mod adds a brand new item to the game: a rat. It’s a fun and simple addition that I created to bring something new into the game. It doesn’t add anything too complicated, just a small and interesting feature that players can enjoy. I wanted to make something lighthearted and easy to use, something that doesn’t change too much about the game but still makes it a bit more fun. I hope you enjoy this little addition as much as I enjoyed making it!

![rat crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808dc8a4d7ea92ba52952e50351ab623711040ec.png)
